purpose: GitHub-tracked metadata for visual crops whose binary files are R2 derived assets.

skipped_regions.caption_literal: En lugar de las molestas gárgaras, disuélvase en la boca una sabrosa pastilla Formamint PASTILLAS GERMICIDAS PARA LA BOCA Y LA GARGANTA Enrique B. Uclés Abogado y Notario Público TEGUCIGALPA}—{HONDURAS Attorney at Law Legal work for Foreign Firms Trade Marks Registered, etc.
skipped_regions.source_context: A combined advertisement for Formamint throat lozenges and the law and notary office of Enrique B. Uclés in Tegucigalpa, Honduras.
